title: The Salary and Allowances of Leaders of Opposition in Parliament Act, 1977
full_text: The Salary and Allowances of Leaders of Opposition in Parliament Act, 1977 संसद् में विपक्षी नेता वेतन और भत्ता अधिनियम, 1977 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197733 Act Number: 33 Enactment Date: 1977-04-18 Act Year: 1977 Short Title: The Salary and Allowances of Leaders of Opposition in Parliament Act, 1977 Hindi Title: संसद् में विपक्षी नेता वेतन और भत्ता अधिनियम, 1977 Long Title: An Act to provide for the salary and allowances of Leaders of Opposition in Parliament. Ministry: Ministry of Parliamentary Affairs Enforcement Date: 01-11-1977 Notification: 1st November, 1977, vide notification No. G.S.R. 664 (E), dated 1st November, 1977, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (i). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Salary and Allowances of Leaders of Opposition in Parliament Act, 1977 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definition. Section 3. Salary, and daily, constituency and sumptuary allowances. Section 4. Residence for Leaders of Opposition. Section 5. Travelling and daily allowances to Leaders of Opposition. Section 6. Medical treatment, etc., to Leaders of Opposition. Section 7. Leaders of Opposition not to draw salary or allowances as Members of Parliament. Section 8. Amenities to Leaders of Opposition. Section 8A. Advance to Leader of Opposition for purchase of motor car. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Notification respecting the date on which persons became or ceased to be Leaders of Opposition to be conclusive evidence thereof. Section 9A. Exemption from liability to pay income-tax on certain perquisites received by a Leader of the Opposition. Section 10. Power to make rule. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. [Repealed.]. Section 12. [Repealed.].
